description: Fetch a Bitbucket Data Center pull request by global numeric id (from the PR URL). Set include_comments to also GET /pull-requests/{id}/comments (paged). Optional start/limit are Bitbucket start/limit query params when include_comments is true.

pull_request_id.description: Pull request id (numeric id in the Bitbucket URL / REST API, not a branch name).

include_comments.description: When true, also fetch comments for this pull request (paged JSON with values, start, limit, isLastPage).

start.description: Paging start offset for comments when include_comments is true (Bitbucket nextPageStart from a prior page).

limit.description: Page size for comments when include_comments is true (Bitbucket default is often 25).
